DispatchCondition.Title: Left Thrust Reverser Sensors Operate Normally (*)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be dispatched with CCS RDC FAULT provided:

ListItem.Para: Left thrust reverser locking actuator proximity sensors operate normally.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be dispatched with CCS RDC FAULT provided:

ListItem.Para: Left thrust reverser is considered inoperative.

Note.Para: For ENG REVERSER SNSR L status message displayed, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 78-31-01 for the left thrust reverser.

DispatchCondition.Title: Right Thrust Reverser Sensors Operate Normally (*)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be dispatched with CCS RDC FAULT provided:

ListItem.Para: Right thrust reverser locking actuator proximity sensors operate normally.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be dispatched with CCS RDC FAULT provided:

ListItem.Para: Right thrust reverser is considered inoperative.

Note.Para: For ENG REVERSER SNSR R status message displayed, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 78-31-01 for the right thrust reverser.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be dispatched with CCS RDC FAULT provided remaining RDCs operate normally.
May be dispatched with CCS RDC FAULT provided remaining RDCs operate normally.
May be inoperative deactivated provided remaining RDCs operate normally.

Note.Para: See Operations Procedure (O) for inoperative functions.
The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL items 32-08-01-05, 33-31-01, 25-63-01, and 33-21-01.

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag.

OperationProcedure.Para: For RDC 19 inoperative, the following functions will be inoperative:

ListItem.Para: One set of redundant databuses for PSDC 2, 3, 4, and 5. Status messages PSDC 2 DATABUS, PSDC 3 DATABUS, PSDC 4 DATABUS and PSDC 5 DATABUS will be displayed. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 32-08-01-05.
Several service area light switches. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 33-31-01, as appropriate for the following items:
One of two lighting control switches for AFT EE Bay Service Lights. The AFT EE Bay Lights may be controlled by the other switch (connected to RDC 8).
Lighting control switch for Main Landing Gear Wheel Well lights.
Lighting control switch for Right ECS service compartment lights.
Emergency evacuation signal system operation not available from attendant panel at Door 4. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 25-63-01.
Attendant work lights in area of Door 3. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 33-21-01.
SATCOM functions cannot be accessed using the center tuning and control panel.
